abilities.name: Get Stuck In, Ladz
abilities.flavor: The roared commands issued by a Megaboss encourage the Ironjawz under their command to fight all the harder.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: You Messin'?
abilities.flavor: Most beings with half an ounce of common sense swiftly wither under the furious gaze of an orruk Brute who has marked their territory.
abilities.effect: Enemy models with a Health characteristic of 1 or 2 cannot contest objectives while they are in combat with this unit.

abilities.name: Unleashed Rage
abilities.flavor: Brute Ragerz waste no time in venting their pent-up rage when they get within striking distance of the foe.
abilities.effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: Unleashed Rage
abilities.flavor: Brute Ragerz waste no time in venting their pent-up rage when they get within striking distance of the foe.
abilities.effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.flavor: The shields carried by Ardboyz are great slabs of iron festooned with spikes and metal teeth, making them deadly weapons in their own right.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Make a shield bash roll of D6 for each model in this unit that is within 3" of the target. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

battleTraits.name: 'Ere We Go!
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. KEYWORDS CORE
